repairs.rejected_candidate: the first page-complete LibreOffice render contained an empty page before the glossary and fragmented the four-column glossary table across narrow columns
repairs.repair: the DOCX-only render workspace linearizes all 21 glossary entries while preserving every field and restores the canonical QMD after rendering
repairs.verification: the repaired exact artifact renders to 644 pages with zero blank, low-ink, near-edge, or out-of-order chapter pages

non_claims: Internal page-complete visual review is not independent-human review.
LibreOffice-rendered raster review does not establish Microsoft Word, LibreOffice GUI, Google Docs, screen-reader, assistive-technology, device-family, or legal-WCAG behavior.
The DOCX-only glossary layout fallback does not change the canonical book prose or approve another format.
Visual quality review does not promote a chapter claim or establish model quality, safety, governance efficacy, AGI, or ASI.
